ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Customer's credit score */,
  "geography" INTEGER /* Geographic location of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the customer with the bank */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the customer's account */,
  "num_products" INTEGER /* Number of products held by the customer */,
  "has_cr_card" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a credit card */,
  "is_active_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is an active member */,
  "estimated_salary" REAL /* Estimated salary of the customer */,
  "exited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has exited */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the customer */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income for the customer */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment to which the customer belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_geography FOREIGN KEY ("geography") REFERENCES geographies ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the geographical location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee associated with the product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer started using the product */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer stopped using the product (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the transaction was made */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn analysis */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer analyzed */,
  "churn_probability" REAL /* Predicted probability of churn */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the customer */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for churn (if applicable) */,
  "churn_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendations to prevent churn */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the last engagement with the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churn_analysis_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., retention, acquisition) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "num_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses received from the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer response */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer responded */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up with the customer */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., complaint, inquiry) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module to which the permission applies */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module to which the role-permission association applies */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the role-permission association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_module" TEXT /* Module where the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
